text:
Sure, here’s a quick fun story: There was a wise old owl named Olga who spent her days listening to the gossip of the forest. Her favorite topic? The annual berry fair. Each autumn, villagers from every corner came to collect glorious red cherries.

Once upon a time, Olga decided to participate in the fair. With her owl eyes she surveyed the sea of crimson fruit baskets. She found a suspiciously large squirrel, gnawing on an enormous pile.

“Excuse me, Mr. Squirrel,” Olga hooted nicely. “What’s this?”

The squirrel paused, then confessed, “I’ve swallowed ten pounds of those things. I thought one would make a decent snack.”

Olga chuckled but didn’t laugh. She collected a dozen cherries. Off she flew.

The next day, the village’s healer approached Olga.
